31:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"BEAM Architecture Overview"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"BEAM (Biological-inspired Episodic-Associative Memory) is the core architecture powering Mnemosyne. It models human memory organization with four distinct tiers, each optimized for different retention and retrieval patterns."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"The Four Memory Tiers"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"children":"graph TB\nsubgraph Input[\"Agent Input\"]\nI1[Observation]\nI2[Conversation]\nI3[Tool Result]\nend"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["subgraph BEAM[\"BEAM Memory System\"]\nWM[Working Memory\nShort-term, up to 10K entries\n","<","100ms access]\nEM[Episodic Memory\nLong-term experiences\nHybrid retrieval]\nSM[Semantic Memory\nStructured facts\nSubject-predicate-object triples]\nSP[Scratchpad\nTemporary workspace\nUp to 1K entries]\nend"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"I1 -->|remember| WM\nI2 -->|remember| WM\nI3 -->|remember| WM\nWM -->|sleep consolidation| EM\nEM -->|recall| Agent"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"style WM fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7\nstyle EM fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706\nstyle SM fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a\nstyle SP fill:#faf5ff,stroke:#9333ea"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Working Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The agent's immediate context window. Holds recent observations, conversation history, and active tool results. Fastest access (<100ms), limited capacity (up to 10,000 entries), and subject to eviction via sleep consolidation."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency"}],": Sub-100ms median"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity"}],": Up to 10,000 entries (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS"}],", default 10,000)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"TTL"}],": 24 hours (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_TTL_HOURS"}],", default 24)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Persistence"}],": Survives process restarts via SQLite"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Episodic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Long-term storage for experiences, conversations, and events. Organized chronologically with rich metadata. Uses hybrid retrieval combining vector similarity and full-text search."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retention"}],": Permanent (until explicit deletion)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retrieval"}],": Hybrid (vector + FTS5) with ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"configurable scoring weights"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}],", defaulting to 50/30/20)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal decay"}],": Tunable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}]," parameters on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Consolidation"}],": Promoted from Working Memory via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Semantic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Structured knowledge stored as subject-predicate-object triples. Managed by the separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class (not part of the main ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," class)."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Format"}],": Subject-predicate-object triples with confidence and validity timestamps"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Query"}],": Filter by subject, predicate, or object via ","$L4"]}],"\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n"]}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c"],["$L2d"],"$L2e"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"z8XDQcUwx1z1UVH0h2I5j"}
4:["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore.query()"}]
5:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Access"}],": Separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class or module-level ",["$","code",null,{"children":"add_triple()"}]," / ",["$","code",null,{"children":"query_triples()"}]," helpers"]}]
6:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Schema"}],": Flexible, no predefined ontology"]}]
7:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Scratchpad"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":"A temporary workspace for reasoning, planning, and intermediate computations. Analogous to human working memory's manipulation buffer."}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity"}],": Up to 1,000 entries (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SP_MAX"}],", default 1,000)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Use case"}],": Chain-of-thought, planning, scratch calculations"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"API"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_write()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_read()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_clear()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Lifetime"}],": Session-bound"]}],"\n"]}]
b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Data Flow"}]
c:["$","$L3",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"children":"sequenceDiagram\nparticipant Agent\nparticipant WM as Working Memory\nparticipant SP as Scratchpad\nparticipant EM as Episodic Memory\nparticipant SM as Semantic Memory (TripleStore)"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Agent->>WM: remember(content)\nWM->>WM: store + index\nAgent->>SP: scratchpad_write(thought)\nSP->>SP: store\nAgent->>EM: recall(query)\nEM->>Agent: return results\nAgent->>SM: add_triple(s, p, o)\nSM->>SM: store triple\nAgent->>SM: query_triples(s, p, o)\nSM->>Agent: return triples"}]]}]
d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Sleep Consolidation"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["Call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," to run a consolidation cycle that:"]}]
f:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Select"}]," Working Memory entries older than TTL/2 (12 hours by default)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Group"}]," candidates by source"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarize"}]," each group via LLM or AAAK text substitution"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}]," summaries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evict"}]," the original Working Memory entries"]}],"\n"]}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep is triggered explicitly — it does not run automatically on a timer."}]
11:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"V2 Features"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v2.3.0 adds several capabilities on top of the core BEAM architecture:"}]
13:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Entity Extraction"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," accepts ",["$","code",null,{"children":"extract_entities=True"}]," to automatically detect named entities (mentions, hashtags, proper nouns) using regex patterns and Levenshtein fuzzy matching. Extracted entities are stored as TripleStore triples."]}]
15:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Fact Extraction"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," accepts ",["$","code",null,{"children":"extract=True"}]," to send content through an LLM pipeline that extracts 2–5 structured factual statements, stored as TripleStore triples. The extraction pipeline gracefully falls back through remote API → local GGUF → skip."]}]
17:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Temporal Recall"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," now supports ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"query_time"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}]," parameters for fine-grained control over how recency influences retrieval. Point-in-time queries allow retrieving memories as they existed at a specific timestamp."]}]
19:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Configurable Scoring"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":["The hybrid scoring weights (",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}],") are now configurable per-query instead of fixed at compile time. Default: 50/30/20."]}]
1b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Memory Banks"}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":["Named banks provide isolated SQLite databases per project or context. Create via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne(bank=\"project-a\")"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne mcp --bank project-a"}],"."]}]
1d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Streaming & Patterns"}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]," provides push/pull event patterns for real-time notifications. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"PatternDetector"}]," discovers temporal, content, and sequence patterns across stored memories. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]," enables incremental synchronization between instances."]}]
1f:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Plugin System"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":["A plugin base class (",["$","code",null,{"children":"MnemosynePlugin"}],") with 4 lifecycle hooks. Built-in plugins: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"LoggingPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MetricsPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"FilterPlugin"}],". Discovers plugins from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/plugins/"}],"."]}]
21:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Tiered Degradation (v2.3)"}]
22:["$","p",null,{"children":["Three-tier degradation for long-term memory health. Memories transition from Tier 1 (full detail, 0-30d) → Tier 2 (LLM-compressed summary, 30-180d) → Tier 3 (entity-extracted signal, 180d+) automatically during ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}],". Cold memories still exist and are queryable but need stronger semantic matches to surface. Zero maintenance, fully configurable via env vars."]}]
23:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Memory Confidence / Veracity (v2.3)"}]
24:["$","p",null,{"children":["Every memory carries a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"veracity"}]," field: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stated"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"inferred"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tool"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"imported"}],", or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"unknown"}],". Recall applies veracity weighting so direct user statements outrank AI inferences. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"get_contaminated()"}]," surfaces non-stated memories for periodic review."]}]
25:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Multi-Agent Identity (v2.1)"}]
26:["$","p",null,{"children":["New ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_type"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}]," columns on both working and episodic memory. Agents in different sessions can share a channel and recall each other's memories. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," accepts identity filters for fine-grained multi-agent coordination."]}]
27:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Cross-Provider Importers (v2.2)"}]
28:["$","p",null,{"children":"One-command migration from Mem0, Letta, Zep, Cognee, Honcho, and SuperMemory. Each importer handles extraction, field mapping, and identity preservation."}]
29:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Design Philosophy"}]
2a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's architecture prioritizes:"}]
2b:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Locality"}],": All data in SQLite — no network calls for retrieval"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transparency"}],": Every operation is inspectable and debuggable"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Efficiency"}],": Sub-100ms retrieval for typical workloads"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Flexibility"}],": Works standalone or as a Hermes plugin"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Privacy"}],": No data leaves your machine by default"]}],"\n"]}]
2c:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2f",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Comparison with Vector-Only Stores"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Unlike pure vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate), Mnemosyne combines dense embeddings with structured storage, full-text search, and temporal relationships. This hybrid approach delivers more precise retrieval for agent use cases where exact facts matter as much as semantic similarity."}]}]]}]]}]}]
2d:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/12r39sjxj5pr8.js","async":true}]
2e:["$","$L30",null,{"children":["$","$31",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@32"}]}]
